name: Flare | Examination
description: Found this game on Roblox and had a blast. Examination a horror PVE FPS involving zombies, infected, stuff like that. Especially for it being a heavy WIP and a passion project from the developer. W game, you should check it out. I honestly don't know if Flare is like a zombie or an experiment or something. Like I said, I just found it and don't know a lot about it. All I know is I shat myself when she came around a corner and watched her massacre my small squad...fun times. That's kind of what the intro is too. So, of course, I'm going to say gore warning.
creator: LoneEcho
